focus: Code quality, security, UX polish, testing, performance. New features and improvements ARE allowed if they match Stakr's direction (gamified self-improvement, social challenges, commitment contracts).

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript null safety errors
tasks.description: Fix 8 'session is possibly null' errors across the codebase. Add proper null checks/guards before accessing session properties. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS18047

tasks.title: Fix missing 'toast' references
tasks.description: 7 files reference 'toast' without importing it. Either import from the toast hook or add the missing useToast() calls. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS2304.*toast

tasks.title: Fix implicit any parameters
tasks.description: ~30 parameters have implicit 'any' types (user, p, w, sum, item, challenge etc). Add explicit types. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS7006

tasks.title: Fix Challenge type mismatches
tasks.description: Properties 'duration', 'difficulty' missing from Challenge type but used in code. Update the Challenge interface or fix the property access. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'Challenge'

tasks.title: Fix ChallengeStats union type narrowing
tasks.description: Properties like total_distributed, reward_distribution, completed_participants, platform_revenue accessed on union types without narrowing. Add type guards. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'ChallengeStats\|XPChallengeStats\|RewardDistribution'

tasks.title: Add error.tsx boundaries to all route groups
tasks.description: Zero error.tsx files found. Add error boundaries to at least: app/dashboard, app/challenge, app/profile, app/discover, app/create-challenge, app/my-challenges, app/settings, app/admin

tasks.title: Reduce 'as any' assertions — top offenders
tasks.description: 907 'as any' assertions in the codebase. Start with lib/ and app/api/ directories — replace with proper types. Target: reduce by 50% in lib/ and app/api/. Run: grep -rn 'as any' lib/ app/api/ | wc -l

tasks.title: Clean up console.log statements in production code
tasks.description: 688 console.log/error calls in lib/ and app/api/. Remove debug logs, keep intentional error logging. Run: grep -rn 'console.log' lib/ app/api/ | head -30

tasks.title: Fix catch(error: any) patterns
tasks.description: 42 catch blocks use 'any' type. Replace with 'unknown' and add proper error narrowing. Run: grep -rn 'catch (.*: any)' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx'

tasks.title: Audit dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage
tasks.description: Found in components/ui/chart.tsx and app/layout.tsx. Verify XSS safety — ensure content is sanitised or from trusted sources only. Add DOMPurify if needed.

tasks.title: Add loading.tsx to key pages
tasks.description: Only 4 loading.tsx files for 30+ pages. Add loading states to: dashboard, discover, challenge/[id], profile, my-challenges, my-active, notifications, settings, admin

tasks.title: API route input validation — add Zod schemas
tasks.description: Check app/api/ routes for missing input validation. Add Zod schemas to at least: auth/register, challenges/[id]/join, payments/checkout, user/profile, upload/presigned-url, social/follow
